title: [ExportVerilog] Fix incorrect inlining of automatic logic
body: This commit first fixes incorrect inlining issue( https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/3603) of automatic logic by restricting `isExpressionEmittedInlineIntoProceduralDeclaration` for read inout op. More specifically, a read from wire is fine but we have to be more careful about reg and logic because they can be assigned with blocking assignments. This PR changes   `isExpressionEmittedInlineIntoProceduralDeclaration` to check users of reg or logic and ensure that there is no blocking assignment.
